title: SQLite client + migrations (schema init only)

task.description: Initialize expo-sqlite database access and implement schema creation for habits and checkins tables, including UNIQUE(habitId,date). This packet must only handle opening DB + creating tables; no CRUD helpers.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: initDb() creates tables habits and checkins with columns exactly: habits(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, createdAt TEXT, isActive INTEGER, currentStreak INTEGER, bestStreak INTEGER).
AC2: initDb() creates checkins(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, habitId TEXT, date TEXT, checkedAt TEXT, isSynced INTEGER, UNIQUE(habitId, date)).
AC3: initDb() can be called twice without throwing and without changing table definitions (idempotent).
AC4: A helper getDb() returns an opened SQLite database instance used by repos.
AC5: App compiles on iOS and Android with Expo SDK 52 and strict TS.

definition_of_done: No repository CRUD code exists in these files.
Schema SQL statements are centralized in migrations.ts.
Errors are surfaced as thrown errors from initDb (to be caught by callers).
db_schema:
CREATE TABLE habits(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, createdAt TEXT, isActive INTEGER, currentStreak INTEGER, bestStreak INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE checkins(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, habitId TEXT, date TEXT, checkedAt TEXT, isSynced INTEGER, UNIQUE(habitId, date));
